registration.title: Registration
registration.target_languages_by_a_comma: Target languages, separated by commas. Example: English, French, Romanian
registration.login_step_longread:
Now let's create an account for the bot.

Password: You can keep the generated one; you can request it later to copy it. Each login will require confirmation. Similar to Telegram, login codes will be sent directly to your Discord/Telegram account. If you lose access to your Discord/Telegram account, you can use this password to log in.

Anonymity: The system will not disclose your personal information (username, Discord/Telegram avatar, ID) to other users (for example, when searching for existing translations in the database).
registration.anon_disclaimer: Leave this field unchecked if you don't want to share your information with other users.
registration.want_connect: Did you want connect another accounts from Discord/Telegram right now?

preferences.notice: You always can change these settings later

main_menu.description: You're now learning $count_languages languages, it's about $count_word words, learned by helping this bot. $count_dbt_words words should be reminded today, to get started press the "Spawn" button.

language_switch.title: Select the language you want to interact with now

alpha_test.thanks: Thanks for contributing to the alpha program!

settings.title: Setting up the bot
settings.change_user_info_tgs: Unfortunately, this function is not compatible with Telegram like with Discord. Type these commands for change needen option: /setusername [new username, 3-24 chars] /setpassword [new password, 8-24 chars] You can also change your username and password in the "Settings" section of the bot in Discord.
settings.change_user_info_success: Your username and password have been changed successfully.

spawn.description: Select filters to spawn needen flashcards.

base_interaction.quota_end: You've reached your usage quota. Ask the developer for more.
base_interaction.error_detection_languages: Parameter error during bulk word upload. The requested words were detected as different languages.

word_interaction.select_by_unidf: Select source-languages, via which we need identify this message. You can select how it will work in settings, "Autoidentify language"
word_interaction.select_target_language: Select the language to translate your message into. You can manage this behavior in the bot settings under `Auto-detect language`
word_interaction.waiting_translation_word: Waiting for the translation of the word **$data** (*est. $source or similar*) to $target **__within $time seconds__**, otherwise the bot will use your AI quota
word_interaction.waiting_translation_phrase: Waiting for the translation of the phrase **$data** (*est. $source or similar*) to $target **__within $time seconds__**, otherwise the bot will use your AI quota
word_interaction.time_is_up: Time is up. AI request fallback needs to be implemented.
word_interaction.no_ai_quota: You have no quota left for AI features. Please contact the developer for more.
